---
title: "My First Post"
subtitle: "Test post to explore the possibilities of Quarto "
date: "27 April 2026"
date-modified: "2 May 2026"
format:
    # pdf: default
    html: 
      toc: true
      toc-location: right
      # code-links: 
      #   - text: Presentation Age Estimation
      #     href: /documents/tfg-uncertainty-age-estimation.pdf
      grid: 
        margin-width: 350px
number-sections: true
---

<!-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------->
<!-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------->
<!-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------->

#
